---
title: "The Rev. Thomas Keble sr."
---

## The Rev. Thomas Keble sr.

**Dates:** (1793-1875)

### Description

Vicar of Bisley, brother of the Rev. John Keble.

### Biography

He married (1825) Elizabeth Jane Clarke, whose sister Charlotte later married his brother John.

### Letters

- Letter from [1 October 1870]
- Letter from April 5. 1866.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
